title: CaoPlus
description: Added a sink like blockhead, but there are also some other features
body:
This mod only added one item:Cao   texture carefully designed by the author（

When receiving a redstone signal, it can be used as a fluid/item trash can, which will destroy all input fluids/items. Right clicking on this square will also destroy the items in hand

After manually pouring two buckets of water into the empty slot, it will become a sink that can provide unlimited water (the usage method is the same as the sink in the lazy kitchen, and the cache should not be as good as that in the blockhead kitchen, because the internal cache of this mod's sink is an int upper limit of -1)

0.2.0,
![Update Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0430d8398b1d142f41d720088465834482b02f7.png)

0.3.5
add milkCao , You can left click on a cow by empty Cao, and the cow will boom (no damage, no damage to the terrain), and then you will get a milk Cao,
